name: Ubiquiti UISP Cable Carrier
title: Ubiquiti UISP Cable Carrier
short_description: CAT5e, Shielded cable, 305 m, Solid Bare Copper Conductor, Solid Polyethylene Insulation
description: The UISP Cable Carrier, identified by the model manufacture part number UISP-Cable-Carrier, embodies precision engineering and reliability, serving as an indispensable component in network infrastructure deployments. It is a Category 5e cable that delivers multilayered elemental protection with a primary braid shield and a weatherproof jacket that prevents damage from rain, snow, and other harsh climatic conditions. The cable is also equipped with a drain wire and internal foil shielding to protect it from electrostatic discharge (ESD), and its anti-crosstalk divider preserves signal integrity, allowing the cable to maintain Gigabit Ethernet link rates even when electromagnetic interference is present. Features: • 1,000 ft (305 m) Category 5e cable • 24 AWG solid copper conductor pairings • Insulated, weatherproof cable jacket • Internal braid and foil shielding • Drain wire protects against ESD damage • Anti-crosstalk divider. At its core, the UISP Cable Carrier features a meticulously designed cable structure optimized for superior signal transmission and robustness. With a cable length of 305 meters (1,000 feet), this shielded CAT5e cable delivers exceptional Ethernet support, enabling data transmission speeds of up to 1 Gbps. The conductor wire gauge of 24 AWG, coupled with solid bare copper conductors, ensures minimal signal attenuation and reliable connectivity over extended distances. The cable's construction incorporates solid polyethylene insulation with precise thickness specifications, providing excellent electrical insulation and protection against environmental factors. Polyester wrapping and an anti-crosstalk divider contribute to enhanced signal integrity, minimizing interference and crosstalk in high-density network environments. Furthermore, the UISP Cable Carrier features a robust jacket made of polyethylene, offering exceptional durability and resistance to abrasion, moisture, and UV exposure. The jacket's thickness and outer diameter are meticulously controlled to ensure uniformity and compliance with stringent standards. With a jacket color of black, the cable maintains a sleek and professional appearance, suitable for various installation environments. Designed for reliability and longevity, the UISP Cable Carrier adheres to industry standards such as ANSI/TIA-568-C.2 (2009) and ISO/IEC 11801 (Edition 2.2), ensuring compatibility and interoperability with existing network infrastructure. Additionally, the cable's wide operating temperature range, from -40 to 80°C (-40 to 176°F), makes it suitable for deployment in extreme environmental conditions, providing reliable performance in diverse applications. Whether deployed in data centers, office buildings, or industrial facilities, the UISP Cable Carrier delivers uncompromising performance, durability, and versatility, making it the ideal choice for high-speed Ethernet connectivity and network reliability.
